name: prism-alerting
description: Yarn script aliases for Python alert workers in ../api (see api/prism_app/alert_workers/)

_resolutions.glob: >=11.1.0 because of jest; try to remove once in a while.

_resolutionsNotes.glob: CVE-2025-64756 + jest compatibility - Parent: (direct devDependency), rimraf, jest - Already at latest (13.0.6) - Review periodically
_resolutionsNotes.js-yaml: CVE-2025-64718 - Security fix - Parent: eslint - Already at latest (4.1.1) - Keep resolution until eslint updates
_resolutionsNotes.ws: GHSA-58qx-3vcg-4xpx / CVE-2026-45736 - Force ws >=8.20.1 for puppeteer-core transitive dependency.
_resolutionsNotes.form-data: CVE-2025-7783 - Security fix - GHSA-fjxv-7rqg-78g4 - Forces v3.0.4+ for transitive dependencies
_resolutionsNotes.lodash: Lodash security fixes - GHSA-r5fr-rjxr-66jc / GHSA-f23m-r3pf-42rh (CVE-2026-4800 / CVE-2026-2950) and prior - Forces v4.18.0+
_resolutionsNotes.basic-ftp: GHSA-5rq4-664w-9x2c path traversal + GHSA-6v7q-wjvx-w8wg + GHSA-rpmf-866q-6p89 (≥5.3.1) - Parent: puppeteer>get-uri - Pin until puppeteer bumps transitive
_resolutionsNotes.**/filelist/minimatch: GHSA-23c5-xmqv-rm74 + GHSA-3ppc-4f35-3m26 + GHSA-7r86-cg39-jmmj - ReDoS in minimatch 5.x - Parent: ejs>jake>filelist - Fix: v5.1.9 (patched)
_resolutionsNotes._brace-expansion: CVE-2026-33750 / GHSA-f886-m6hf-6m8v - Transitive brace-expansion pinned in yarn.lock (^2.0.1→2.0.3, ^5.0.2→5.0.5); Yarn v1 cannot express those overrides reliably via resolutions alone.

scripts.alert-worker: bash -lc 'cd ../api && PYTHONPATH=. poetry run python -m prism_app.workers.alert_runner threshold'
scripts.aa-storm-alert-worker: bash -lc 'cd ../api && PYTHONPATH=. poetry run python -m prism_app.workers.alert_runner aa-storm'
scripts.aa-flood-alert-worker: bash -lc 'cd ../api && PYTHONPATH=. poetry run python -m prism_app.workers.alert_runner aa-flood'
scripts.check-alerts-db-contract: bash -lc 'cd ../api && PYTHONPATH=. poetry run python -m prism_app.ci.alert_db_contract'
scripts.smoke-alerts-db-pool: bash -lc 'cd ../api && PYTHONPATH=. poetry run python -m prism_app.ci.alert_db_smoke'
scripts.smoke-alerting-workers: bash -lc 'cd ../api && PYTHONPATH=. poetry run python -m prism_app.workers.alert_runner smoke'
scripts.docker-alert: bash -lc 'cd ../api && PYTHONPATH=. poetry run python -m prism_app.workers.alert_runner threshold'
